name: Acid
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 25 GP When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus ) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

name: Alchemist's Fire
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 50 GP When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist’s Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus ) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning .

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 50 GP Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15) Craft: Acid , Alchemist’s Fire , Component Pouch , Oil , Paper , Perfume

name: Amulet
description: Adventuring Gear (Holy Symbol) Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 5 GP A Holy Symbol is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus . An Amulet can be worn or held.

name: Animal Feed (per day)
description: Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 5 CP

name: Antitoxin
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 50 GP As a Bonus Action , you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Arrows
description: Adventuring Gear (Ammunition) Amount: 20 Storage: Quiver Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. Storage must be bought separately.

name: Backpack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 2 GP A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Bagpipes
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 30 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Ball Bearings
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 GP As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch . They spread to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Ball Bearings.

name: Barrel
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 70 lb. Cost: 2 GP A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basic Poison
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 100 GP As a Bonus Action , you can use a vial of Basic Poison to coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Once applied, the poison retains potency for 1 minute or until its damage is dealt, whichever comes first.

name: Basket
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 4 SP A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

name: Battleaxe
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Slashing Properties: Versatile (1d10) Mastery: Topple Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Bedroll
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 7 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold (see the Dungeon Master ’s Guide ).

name: Bell
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 GP When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Blanket
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 5 SP While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold (see the Dungeon Master ’s Guide ).

name: Block and Tackle
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Blowgun
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 25/100; Needle ), Loading Mastery: Vex Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Bolts
description: Adventuring Gear (Ammunition) Amount: 20 Storage: Case Weight: 1½ lb. Cost: 1 GP Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. Storage must be bought separately.

name: Book
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 25 GP A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

name: Breastplate
description: Medium Armor Armor Class: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2) Strength: — Stealth: — Weight: 20 lb. Cost: 400 GP

name: Brewer's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 9 lb. Cost: 20 GP Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10) Craft: Antitoxin

name: Bucket
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 CP A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

name: Bullseye Lantern
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

name: Burglar's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 42 lb. Cost: 16 GP A Burglar’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Ball Bearings , Bell , 10 Candles , Crowbar , Hooded Lantern , 7 flasks of Oil , 5 days of Rations , Rope , Tinderbox , and Waterskin .

name: Calligrapher's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 10 GP Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15) Craft: Ink , Spell Scroll (Cantrip) , Spell Scroll (Level 1)

name: Caltrops
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 GP As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Caltrops.

name: Candle
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 CP For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

name: Carpenter's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Strength Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 8 GP Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20) Craft: Club , Greatclub , Quarterstaff , Barrel , Chest , Ladder , Pole , Portable Ram , Torch

name: Cartographer's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Wisdom Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 15 GP Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15) Craft: Map

name: Chain
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 5 GP As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled , Incapacitated , or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. If the creature’s legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Chain requires the creature to make a successful DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action. Bursting the Chain requires a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.

name: Chain Mail
description: Heavy Armor Armor Class: 16 Strength: Str 13 Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 55 lb. Cost: 75 GP

name: Chain Shirt
description: Medium Armor Armor Class: 13 + Dex modifier (max 2) Strength: — Stealth: — Weight: 20 lb. Cost: 50 GP

name: Chest
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 25 lb. Cost: 5 GP A Chest holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

name: Climber's Kit
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 12 lb. Cost: 25 GP A Climber’s Kit includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can use the Climber’s Kit to anchor yourself; when you do, you can’t fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point, and you can’t move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action .

name: Club
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d4 Bludgeoning Properties: Light Mastery: Slow Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 SP

name: Cobbler's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 5 GP Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer’s next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10) Craft: Climber’s Kit

name: Component Pouch
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

name: Cook's Utensils
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Wisdom Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 1 GP Utilize: Improve food’s flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15) Craft: Rations

name: Costume
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 5 GP While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

name: Crossbow Bolt Case
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Crossbow Bolt Case holds up to 20 Bolts .

name: Crowbar
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 2 GP Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar’s leverage can be applied.

name: Crystal
description: Adventuring Gear (Arcane Focus) Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer , Warlock , or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus .

name: Dagger
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d4 Piercing Properties: Finesse , Light , Thrown ( Range 20/60) Mastery: Nick Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 2 GP

name: Dart
description: Simple Ranged Weapon Damage: 1d4 Piercing Properties: Finesse , Thrown ( Range 20/60) Mastery: Vex Weight: 1/4 lb. Cost: 5 CP

description: Tool (Gaming Set) Ability: Wisdom Weight: — Cost: 1 SP Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

name: Diplomat's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 39 lb. Cost: 39 GP A Diplomat’s Pack contains the following items: Chest , Fine Clothes , Ink , 5 Ink Pens , Lamp , 2 Map Cases or Scroll Cases , 4 flasks of Oil , 5 sheets of Paper , 5 sheets of Parchment , Perfume , and Tinderbox .

name: Disguise Kit
description: Tool Ability: Charisma Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 25 GP Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10) Craft: Costume

name: Dragonchess Set
description: Tool (Gaming Set) Ability: Wisdom Weight: — Cost: 1 GP Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

name: Drum
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 6 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Dulcimer
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 25 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Dungeoneer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 55 lb. Cost: 12 GP A Dungeoneer’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Caltrops , Crowbar , 2 flasks of Oil , 10 days of Rations , Rope , Tinderbox , 10 Torches , and Waterskin .

name: Emblem
description: Adventuring Gear (Holy Symbol) Weight: — Cost: 5 GP A Holy Symbol is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus . An Emblem can be borne on fabric or a Shield .

name: Entertainer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 58½ lb. Cost: 40 GP An Entertainer’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Bedroll , Bell , Bullseye Lantern , 3 Costumes , Mirror , 8 flasks of Oil , 9 days of Rations , Tinderbox , and Waterskin .

name: Exotic Saddle
description: Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 60 GP A saddle comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle. An Exotic Saddle is required for riding an aquatic or a flying mount.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 55 lb. Cost: 10 GP An Explorer’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Bedroll , 2 flasks of Oil , 10 days of Rations , Rope , Tinderbox , 10 Torches , and Waterskin .

name: Fine Clothes
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 15 GP Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

name: Firearm Bullets
description: Adventuring Gear (Ammunition) Amount: 10 Storage: Pouch Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 3 GP Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. Storage must be bought separately.

description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning Properties: — Mastery: Sap Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP

description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 2 CP A Flask holds up to 1 pint.

description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 2 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Forgery Kit
description: Tool Ability: Dexterity Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 15 GP Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else’s handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20)

name: Glaive
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d10 Slashing Properties: Heavy , Reach , Two-Handed Mastery: Graze Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 20 GP

name: Glass Bottle
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 2 GP A Glass Bottle holds up to 1½ pints.

name: Glassblower's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 30 GP Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15) Craft: Glass Bottle , Magnifying Glass , Spyglass , Vial

name: Grappling Hook
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 2 GP As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 feet of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.

name: Greataxe
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d12 Slashing Properties: Heavy , Two-Handed Mastery: Cleave Weight: 7 lb. Cost: 30 GP

description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d10 Slashing Properties: Heavy , Reach , Two-Handed Mastery: Cleave Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 20 GP

description: Medium Armor Armor Class: 15 + Dex modifier (max 2) Strength: — Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 750 GP

name: Hand Crossbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1d6 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 30/120; Bolt ), Light , Loading Mastery: Vex Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 75 GP

name: Handaxe
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Slashing Properties: Light , Thrown ( Range 20/60) Mastery: Vex Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Healer's Kit
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 5 GP A Healer’s Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1d10 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 100/400; Bolt ), Heavy , Loading , Two-Handed Mastery: Push Weight: 18 lb. Cost: 50 GP

name: Herbalism Kit
description: Tool Ability: Intelligence Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 5 GP Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10) Craft: Antitoxin , Candle , Healer’s Kit , Potion of Healing

name: Hide Armor
description: Medium Armor Armor Class: 12 + Dex modifier (max 2) Strength: — Stealth: — Weight: 12 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Holy Water
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 25 GP When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus ) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

name: Hooded Lantern
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action , you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

name: Horn
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 3 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Hunting Trap
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 25 lb. Cost: 5 GP As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap, which is a sawtooth steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate in the center. The trap is affixed by a heavy chain to an immobile object, such as a tree or a spike driven into the ground. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. Thereafter, until the creature breaks free of the trap, its movement is limited by the length of the chain (typically 3 feet). A creature can use its action to make a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success. Each failed check deals 1 Piercing damage to the trapped creature.

name: Ink
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 10 GP Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 2 CP Using Ink , an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

name: Iron Pot
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 2 GP An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Iron Spikes
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 1 GP Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can use a blunt object, such as a Light Hammer , to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material. You can do so to jam a door shut or to then tie a Rope or Chain to the Spike.

name: Javelin
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Piercing Properties: Thrown ( Range 30/120) Mastery: Slow Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 SP

name: Jeweler's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP Utilize: Discern a gem’s value (DC 15) Craft: Arcane Focus: Crystal , Orb , Rod , Wand , Holy Symbol: Amulet , Emblem , Reliquary

name: Jug
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 2 CP A Jug holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 25 lb. Cost: 1 SP A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

name: Lamp
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 5 SP A Lamp burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

name: Lance
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d10 Piercing Properties: Heavy , Reach , Two-Handed (unless mounted) Mastery: Topple Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Leather Armor
description: Light Armor Armor Class: 11 + Dex modifier Strength : — Stealth: — Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Light Crossbow
description: Simple Ranged Weapon Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 80/320; Bolt ), Loading , Two-Handed Mastery: Slow Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 25 GP

name: Lock
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves’ Tools to pick this Lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Longbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 150/600; Arrow ), Heavy , Two-Handed Mastery: Slow Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 50 GP

description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Slashing Properties: Versatile (1d10) Mastery: Sap Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 15 GP

description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 35 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Lyre
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 30 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Mace
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Bludgeoning Properties: — Mastery: Sap Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Magnifying Glass
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 100 GP A Magnifying Glass grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire with a Magnifying Glass requires light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite, and about 5 minutes for the fire to ignite.

name: Manacles
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 2 GP As a Utilize action, you can use Manacles to bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled , Incapacitated , or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. While bound, a creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls , and the creature is Restrained if the Manacles are attached to a chain or hook that is fixed in place. Escaping the Manacles requires a successful DC 20 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check as an action. Bursting them requires a successful DC 25 Strength (Athletics) check as an action. Each set of Manacles comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves’ Tools to pick the Manacles’ lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Map
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 GP If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the place represented on it.

name: Map Case
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Map Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment .

name: Mason's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Strength Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 10 GP Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10) Craft: Block and Tackle

name: Maul
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 2d6 Bludgeoning Properties: Heavy , Two-Handed Mastery: Topple Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Military Saddle
description: Weight: 30 lb. Cost: 20 GP A saddle comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle. A Military Saddle gives Advantage on any ability check you make to remain mounted.

name: Mirror
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1/2 lb. Cost: 5 GP A handheld steel Mirror is useful for personal cosmetics but also for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Morningstar
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: — Mastery: Sap Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 15 GP

name: Musket
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1d12 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 40/120; Bullet ), Loading , Two-Handed Mastery: Slow Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 500 GP

name: Navigator's Tools
description: Tools Ability: Wisdom Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP Utilize: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15)

name: Needles
description: Adventuring Gear (Ammunition) Amount: 50 Storage: Pouch Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. Storage must be bought separately.

name: Net
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 1 GP When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net. Target a creature you can see within 15 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus ) or have the Restrained condition until it escapes. The target succeeds automatically if it is Huge or larger. To escape, the target or a creature within 5 feet of it must take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the Restrained creature on a success. Destroying the Net (AC 10; 5 HP; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage) also frees the target, ending the effect.

name: Oil
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 SP You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below. Dousing a Creature or an Object. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus ) or be covered in oil. If the target takes Fire damage before the oil dries (after 1 minute), the target takes an extra 5 Fire damage from burning oil. Dousing a Space. You can take the Utilize action to pour an Oil flask on level ground to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. If lit, the oil burns until the end of the turn 2 rounds from when the oil was lit (or 12 seconds) and deals 5 Fire damage to any creature that enters the area or ends its turn there. A creature can take this damage only once per turn. Fuel. Oil serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. That duration doesn’t need to be consecutive; you can extinguish the burning Oil (as a Utilize action) and rekindle it again until it has burned for a total of 6 hours.

name: Orb
description: Adventuring Gear (Arcane Focus) Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 20 GP An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer , Warlock , or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus .

name: Padded Armor
description: Light Armor Armor Class: 11 + Dex modifier Strength: — Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Painter's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Wisdom Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 10 GP Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you’ve seen (DC 10) Craft: Druidic Focus: Sprig of Mistletoe , Yew Wand , Holy Symbol: Amulet , Emblem , Reliquary

name: Pan Flute
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 12 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Paper
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 2 SP One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 SP One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Perfume
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 5 GP Perfume comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying Perfume to yourself, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet of yourself.

name: Pike
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d10 Piercing Properties: Heavy , Reach , Two-Handed Mastery: Push Weight: 18 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Pistol
description: Martial Ranged Weapons Damage: 1d10 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 30/90; Bullet ), Loading Mastery: Vex Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 250 GP

name: Plate Armor
description: Heavy Armor Armor Class: 18 Strength: Str 15 Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 65 lb. Cost: 1,500 GP

name: Playing Card Set
description: Tool (Gaming Set) Ability: Wisdom Weight: — Cost: 5 SP Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

name: Poisoner's Kit
description: Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 50 GP Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10) Craft: Basic Poison

name: Pole
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 7 lb. Cost: 5 CP A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump , you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.

name: Portable Ram
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 35 lb. Cost: 4 GP You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you Advantage on this check.

name: Potion of Healing
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1/2 lb. Cost: 50 GP This potion is a magic item. As a Bonus Action , you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points .

name: Potter's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Intelligence Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 10 GP Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15) Craft: Jug , Lamp

name: Pouch
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 5 SP A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Priest's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 29 lb. Cost: 33 GP A Priest’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Blanket , Holy Water , Lamp , 7 days of Rations , Robe , and Tinderbox .

name: Quarterstaff
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Bludgeoning Properties: Versatile (1d8) Mastery: Topple Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 2 SP

name: Quiver
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Quiver holds up to 20 Arrows .

name: Rapier
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: Finesse Mastery: Vex Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP

name: Rations
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 SP Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See “ Malnutrition ” for the risks of not eating.

name: Reliquary
description: Adventuring Gear (Holy Symbol) Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP A Holy Symbol is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus . A Reliquary can be held.

name: Riding Saddle
description: Weight: 25 lb. Cost: 10 GP A saddle comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle.

name: Ring Mail
description: Heavy Armor Armor Class: 14 Strength: — Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 30 GP

name: Robe
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

name: Rod
description: Adventuring Gear (Arcane Focus) Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer , Warlock , or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus .

name: Rope
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 1 GP As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check. You can bind an unwilling creature with the Rope only if the creature has the Grappled , Incapacitated , or Restrained condition. If the creature’s legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Rope requires the creature to make a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action.

name: Sack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1/2 lb. Cost: 1 CP A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

name: Scale Mail
description: Medium Armor Armor Class: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2) Strength: — Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 45 lb. Cost: 50 GP

name: Scholar's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 22 lb. Cost: 40 GP A Scholar’s Pack contains the following items: Backpack , Book , Ink , Ink Pen , Lamp , 10 flasks of Oil , 10 sheets of Parchment , and Tinderbox .

name: Scimitar
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Slashing Properties: Finesse , Light Mastery: Nick Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 25 GP

name: Scroll Case
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 GP A Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment .

name: Shawm
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 2 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Shield
description: Shield Armor Class: +2 Strength: — Stealth: — Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Shortbow
description: Simple Ranged Weapon Damage: 1d6 Piercing Properties: Ammunition ( Range 80/320; Arrow ), Two-Handed Mastery: Vex Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP

name: Shortsword
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Piercing Properties: Finesse , Light Mastery: Vex Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP

name: Shovel
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 2 GP Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

name: Sickle
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d4 Slashing Properties: Light Mastery: Nick Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 GP

name: Signal Whistle
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 5 CP When blown as a Utilize action, a Signal Whistle produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Sling
description: Simple Ranged Weapon Damage: 1d4 Bludgeoning Properties: Ammunition ( Range 30/120; Bullet ) Mastery: Slow Weight: — Cost: 1 SP

name: Sling Bullets
description: Adventuring Gear (Ammunition) Amount: 20 Storage: Pouch Weight: 1½ lb. Cost: 4 CP Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon's description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. Storage must be bought separately.

name: Smith's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Strength Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 20 GP Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20) Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings , Bucket , Caltrops , Chain , Crowbar , Firearm Bullets , Grappling Hook , Iron Pot , Iron Spikes , Sling Bullets

name: Spear
description: Simple Melee Weapon Damage: 1d6 Piercing Properties: Thrown ( Range 20/60), Versatile (1d8) Mastery: Sap Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 1 GP

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 30 GP A Spell Scroll (Cantrip) is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll’s creator. If the spell is on your class’s spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components. If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll , the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 50 GP A Spell Scroll (Level 1) is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll’s creator. If the spell is on your class’s spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components. If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll , the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Splint Armor
description: Heavy Armor Armor Class: 17 Strength: Str 15 Stealth: Disadvantage Weight: 60 lb. Cost: 200 GP

name: Sprig of Mistletoe
description: Adventuring Gear (Druidic Focus) Weight: — Cost: 1 GP A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus .

name: Spyglass
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1,000 GP Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

name: String
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 SP String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: Light Armor Armor Class: 12 + Dex modifier Strength: — Stealth: — Weight: 13 lb. Cost: 45 GP

name: Tent
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 20 lb. Cost: 2 GP A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 25 GP Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15)

name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
description: Tool (Gaming Set) Ability: Wisdom Weight: — Cost: 1 GP Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

name: Tinderbox
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 5 SP A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle , Lamp , Bullseye Lantern , Hooded Lantern , or Torch —or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action . Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

name: Tinker's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 50 GP Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20) Craft: Musket , Pistol , Bell , Bullseye Lantern , Flask , Hooded Lantern , Hunting Trap , Lock , Manacles , Mirror , Shovel , Signal Whistle , Tinderbox

name: Torch
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 1 CP A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch, using it as a Simple Melee weapon. On a hit, the target takes 1 Fire damage.

name: Traveler's Clothes
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 2 GP Traveler’s Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

name: Trident
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: Thrown ( Range 20/60), Versatile (1d10) Mastery: Topple Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Vial
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: — Cost: 1 GP A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Viol
description: Tool (Musical Instrument) Ability: Charisma Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 30 GP Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

name: Wand
description: Adventuring Gear (Arcane Focus) Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer , Warlock , or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus .

name: War Pick
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Piercing Properties: Versatile (1d10) Mastery: Sap Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP

name: Warhammer
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning Properties: Versatile (1d10) Mastery: Push Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 15 GP

name: Waterskin
description: Adventuring Gear Weight: 5 lb. (full) Cost: 2 SP A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don’t drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration .

name: Weaver's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 1 GP Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10) Craft: Padded Armor , Basket , Bedroll , Blanket , Fine Clothes , Net , Robe , Rope , Sack , String , Tent , Traveler’s Clothes

name: Whip
description: Martial Melee Weapon Damage: 1d4 Slashing Properties: Finesse , Reach Mastery: Slow Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 2 GP

name: Woodcarver's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools Ability: Dexterity Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 1 GP Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10) Craft: Club , Greatclub , Quarterstaff , Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus: Crystal , Orb , Rod , Wand , Arrows , Bolts , Druidic Focus: Sprig of Mistletoe , Yew Wand , Ink Pen , Needles

name: Yew Wand
description: Adventuring Gear (Druidic Focus) Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus .
